title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 509.430 - Counterclaim exceeding opposing claim
text:
509.430.  Counterclaim exceeding opposing claim. — A counterclaim may or may not diminish or defeat the recovery sought by the opposing party.  It may claim relief exceeding in amount or different in kind from that sought in the pleading of the opposing party.
(L. 1943 p. 353 § 74)
